items.title: No 10 says 'nothing off the table' over new US tariffs as UK could be among worst hit
items.description: Downing Street says discussions are ongoing following US President Donald Trump's announcement of a 15% global tariffs.

items.title: Teen guilty of belonging to banned neo-Nazi group
items.description: The boy, 16, is also convicted of the possession of terror documents and sharing terror publications.
